entities.description: kg refers to a knowledge graph used to support effective reasoning in the bookrag system
agent based planning is a mechanism assessed for its necessity in the system s performance
ift inspired selection mechanism is a strategy evaluated for its role in the system s efficiency
multi dimensional reasoning is a strategy validated for its effectiveness in the system
dynamic skyline filtering strategy is a method validated for its effectiveness in the system
table 7 is a reference in the text showing performance degradation across variants
bookrag is the system being evaluated in the text
the w o gradient er variant is a specific configuration used to test the role of the knowledge graph
the planning mechanism is a component whose removal causes significant performance loss
the w o selector variant is a configuration used to validate the efficiency of the selection strategy
qasper is a dataset used to measure computational cost in tokens
tokens are the unit of measurement used to quantify computational cost
gradient er is a specific component or technique whose removal in the w o variant highlights the role of the knowledge graph
the selector is a component whose removal in the w o variant validates the efficiency of the selection strategy
the narrow then reason strategy is the specific approach inspired by ift that is being validated for efficiency
a static workflow is described as insufficient for handling diverse types of queries  contrasting with the dynamic approach
queries are the diverse types of tasks that the system is designed to handle
retrieval performance is the metric used to evaluate the impact of kg quality
accuracy is a metric maintained by the w o selector variant despite high computational costs
computational cost is a metric measured in tokens to evaluate the efficiency of the variants
performance degradation is the observed outcome across all variants confirming the essential role of each module
performance loss is the significant drop observed when the planning mechanism is removed

relations.description: the kg is a critical component within the bookrag system supporting effective reasoning
agent based planning is a mechanism assessed for its necessity within the bookrag system
the ift inspired selection mechanism is a strategy evaluated for its efficiency in the bookrag system
multi dimensional reasoning is a strategy validated for its effectiveness in the bookrag system
the dynamic skyline filtering strategy is a method validated for its effectiveness in the bookrag system
table 7 presents data regarding the performance of the bookrag system variants
the w o gradient er variant highlights the critical role of the kg in the system
the planning mechanism is a component of bookrag whose removal causes significant performance loss
the w o selector variant validates the efficiency of the ift inspired selection mechanism
the w o selector variant incurs a computational cost measured in tokens on the qasper dataset
the ift inspired selection mechanism s efficiency is validated using the qasper dataset
